blocker.reason: No reviewed full numeric benchmark runner exists for the frozen 7x12 roster; emitting complete status matrices is possible, but promoting smoke/preflight values to value or gradient errors would violate the evidence contract.
blocker.required_repair: Implement actual per-cell numeric benchmark adapters for the frozen roster or explicitly revise the P8 criterion before claiming benchmark performance.

run_manifest.dirty_state_summary: dirty worktree preserved; unrelated changes not reverted
run_manifest.cpu_gpu_status: CPU-only; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=-1 for validation; no GPU conclusion
run_manifest.dtype: manifest-level only; per-row dtype lives in P1 registry
run_manifest.seeds: Smoke payload seeds retained only as non-performance diagnostics

post_run_red_team_note.strongest_alternative_explanation: The complete-looking matrices may be mistaken for performance matrices even though all numeric errors are null.
post_run_red_team_note.would_overturn_blocker: A reviewed command that computes actual value and eligible gradient errors for the frozen roster, with MC uncertainty for stochastic DPF rows and no proxy promotion.
post_run_red_team_note.weakest_part_of_evidence: P8 currently emits matrix structure and statuses, not full benchmark numerical results.

nonclaims: P8 output is not a filter ranking
P8 output does not contain full numeric benchmark errors
P7 preflight is not benchmark evidence
smoke fixtures are not benchmark performance evidence
no HMC, GPU, or Bayesian-estimation readiness
